title: PaleoCraft Revival
description: A mod that brings the classic PaleoCraft mod to a newer version of minecraft.
body:
# **Revivies the past**

Brings back the joy of the PaleoCraft mod for minecraft java 1.7.10 and brings it to 1.20.1 with brand new features. Adds new dinosaurs such as Tyrannosaurus, Protoceratops, Sauroposiden and more.

# **New features**

Has a new dimension witch was planned to be added to the original PaleoCraft but, never made it in to the mod. In the dimension there are a few biomes here is all of them: The PaleoPlains, The PaleoDesert and the PaleoForest.


# **Dinosaurs**

Now for the part you've all been waiting for THE DINOSAURS
so far there are the Tyrannosaurus Rex (aka T-rex), Protoceratops, Sauroposieden, Baryonyx, Dromaeosaurus, Troodon, Masospondylus and probably a bunch of others I forgot you can also tame the Dromaeosaurus with raw beef.
![Tyrannosaurus :)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/78f4f95c8790ad69e4fdb7a7747c56602a6a120c.png)

# **Issues**

If there are ANY bugs and I mean ANY bugs even if is just a small one tell me IMIDEATLY becasue it may be a coding bug that could cause other bugs.

# **Credits**

Me for pretty much everything such as coding, modeling, texturing and even writting this thing your reading right now (it took me a long time to write this so please apriciate it) so if anything is bad just blame be. And also I made this on MCreator so thanks Pylo for making Mcreator [(You can dowload MCreator here)](https://mcreator.net/)
